About Me

Driven by
precision & purpose.

I'm a secondary school student in Bizerte, Tunisia, on the mathematics track — preparing for my Baccalaureate while simultaneously building real-world skills in programming, electronics, and engineering.

From automotive workshops to electrical installations, I believe engineering is learned with your hands. My Python cybersecurity projects and technical YouTube content show that I don't wait for a classroom to start building.

Fluent in Arabic, French, English, and Italian, I'm preparing for international university applications and internships at companies like BMW and Siemens — where engineering meets scale.
